steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to explain what a sky island is. The correct sentence must define the concept, not just describe the specific mountain range.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The Sierra San Luis is an isolated mountain range located in northwestern Mexico whose environment differs drastically from that of the surrounding lowlands.: describes the Sierra San Luis without defining 'sky island.' ✗
  • Choice B — A sky island is an isolated mountain range, such as the Sierra San Luis in northwestern Mexico, whose environment differs drastically from that of the surrounding lowlands.: defines a sky island as an isolated mountain range whose environment differs drastically from the surrounding lowlands, then uses the Sierra San Luis as an example. ✓
  • Choice C — The Sierra San Luis, which is considered to be a sky island, is located in northwestern Mexico.: mentions the term 'sky island' but does not explain what it means. ✗
  • Choice D — The USFS considers the Sierra San Luis to be a "unique ecosystem.": focuses on the unique-ecosystem quote and specific mountain range rather than defining the concept. ✗
That matches Choice B — A sky island is an isolated mountain range, such as the Sierra San Luis in northwestern Mexico, whose environment differs drastically from that of the surrounding lowlands..
